Omar Chehab
Defense

Hi, you will find here the updated information on my Ph.D. defense on Advances in Self-Supervised Learning: applications to neuroscience and sample-efficiency.

Ph.D. Defense

  • When: Friday, November 24, 2pm.
  • Where: room Gilles Kahn, Inria Saclay, 1 Rue Honoré d’Estienne d’Orves, 91120.
  • Zoom link: will be posted later.
  • Registration deadline: Wednesday, November 15 (drop me a message).

Due to current security measures, you will have to provide a valid ID upon entry.

I am aware this event is during work hours and is not near the city center, so the virtual option could be more convenient.

How to get there? The site is an hour away from Paris by public transport, or 40 minutes away by car. For public transport: take RER B to Massy Palaiseau, then walk 5mn and take bus 91.10 to Ferme de la Vauve and walk 10mn.

Afterparty

  • When: Friday, November 24, 8pm.
  • Where: a bar in Paris (details to come).

If you plan to attend, please drop me a message so I can plan the headcount.

Last updated October 25, 2023.
